# Housing — Podcast Episode Outline (20-30 min)

> Generated from repos.json + content.json | 2026-04-07

## Episode Title

"Access To Housing: AI-powered real estate intelligence for informed decisions"

## Episode Summary

A deep dive into how AI-powered Claude Skills are closing the housing access gap for real estate professionals, investors, and housing counselors. We explore real use cases, cross-pillar connections, and how practitioners can start using these tools today — no code required.

---

## Segment 1: Introduction (3 min)

- Host intro and episode framing
- The access gap in housing: why it matters
- Who this episode is for: real estate professionals, investors, housing counselors

## Segment 2: What is Access To Housing? (5 min)

- What Claude Skills are and how they work
- The 3-step process: Clone → Upload → Converse
- What makes access-to-housing different from generic AI
- Scope: nationwide

## Segment 3: Use Cases Deep Dive (8 min)

### Run a comparative market analysis with climate risk scoring
- How it works in practice
- Who benefits most
- Real-world example

### Check Fair Housing compliance before listing a property
- How it works in practice
- Who benefits most
- Real-world example

### Generate an investment feasibility report for multifamily housing
- How it works in practice
- Who benefits most
- Real-world example



## Segment 4: Cross-Pillar Connections (5 min)

- How Housing connects to: - Safety (access-to-safety)
- Jobs (access-to-jobs)
- Services (access-to-services)

- Cross-pillar story: **Survivor's Path** — Start with a safety plan, connect to healthcare, find stable housing, and access ongoing support services.
- Why integrated access matters more than siloed tools

## Segment 5: The Bigger Picture (5 min)

- The Access To ecosystem: 6 pillars, 7 projects
- Founded by Doug Devitre (CoTrackPro)
- Open source model: why free matters for civic tech
- Social proof: AFCC, Missouri Bar, NASW, EAPA, Justice Technology Association

## Segment 6: How to Get Started (3 min)

- Step-by-step: how a listener can start using access-to-housing today
- How to contribute (CONTRIBUTING.md)
- Where to find help: https://dougdevitre.org, dougdevitre@gmail.com
- Call to action: Start analyzing properties
